spec_match.rationale: Matches the spec contract precisely. Contrasts the shrink-wrapping and maximum capping features of fit-content() against standard max-content and fixed-width constraints natively.

interactive.rationale: Interactive slider dynamically controls content word lengths and monitors container pixel width changes in real-time using programmatic DOM measurement loops.

edge_cases.rationale: Contains proper warning banners for non-150 browsers.

design_system.rationale: Excellent minimal layout, solid borders, clear mono headers.

summary: A flawless basic interactive overview highlighting fit-content behavior side-by-side against fixed-width and max-content layouts using real-time layout pixel measurement.
